titleStmt.title: SII 39.164: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 164. (A.R. No. 164 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARĀGHAVA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE. MADHURĀNTAKA-POTTAPPICHCHŌḺAṈ VIJAYAGAṆḌAGŌPĀLA DĒVA-15TH YEAR (1265 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription registers the gift of a land in the village Vikramachōḻanallūr, (a hamlet) situated between Vaḍagarai vallanāḍu and Teṉkarai Dāmal kōṭṭam for conducting festivals in the temple. It was gifted after removing taxes like poṉvari, kudiraivari, sekku kaḍamai, tariyiṟai, taṭṭārbhāṭṭam, iṉavari and ēri-mīṉbhāṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ tripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷil maturāntakap pottappic cOḻaṉ vicayakaṇṭa kopāla tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5 vatu meṣānāyaṟṟu pūrvva pakṣattu tritiyaiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūca nakṣatrattu nāḷ
jayaṅ koṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattut tāmalkkoṭṭattut tāmalnāṭṭut tiruppati tiruppukkuḻi vijayarākavap perumāḷukku tirunāṭpaṭikkum palapaṇi nimantattukkum tiruviṭai
yāṭṭam maṇṭalattu vaṭakarai vallanāṭu teṉkarai tāmalkoṭṭam naṭuvikkirama coḻanallūril taṇṭalattukkum piṭākai kiḻpāṟkellai kalattāṉ Ellaikku meṟku paṇṭārattā ṉel
laikkum meṟku teṉpāṟkkellai tāmalā kellaikku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai veḷiyanallūṟ kellaikkum �ttā ṉellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ellaikku teṟkum Iṉṉāṟpāṟ kellaikkum naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum
kollai nilamum Ivvāṇṭai Āṭimātam mutal kaṭamaiyum Āyamum kācukaṭamaiyum poṉvari kutiraivari cekkukaṭamai taṟiyiṟai taṭṭārappāṭṭam Inavari Erimiṉpāṭṭam Eppeṟpaṭṭa Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa sarvvamāṉiya
māka candrātityavarai celvatāka cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ maturāntakap pottappic coḻaṉ vijayakaṇṭakopāla tevaṉeṉ Ivai Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.164 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
